$comment: c16 shipped <dlfcn.h> on macOS — the RED-ON-DISABLE pin for the RTLD_GLOBAL per-format constant variant (8 macho / 256 elf; a collision trap with RTLD_DEEPBIND=0x8 / RTLD_FIRST=0x100). dlopen/dlsym run from libSystem. Single arm64-macho target → runs on the macos-latest CI leg. exit 42 iff the macho RTLD_GLOBAL variant (8) was selected AND dlopen/dlsym resolve. RED-ON-DISABLE: a broken selector hands macho the elf 256 != 8 → exit 1. Release arm runs the optimizer over the loader calls.
